tips_en: Start with the RLVR paper (NPO) because it introduces a new reinforcement‑learning method for multimodal reasoning with clear performance gains; understanding its mixed‑policy framework will give you the foundation for the coordinated RL used in the image‑editing paper and the turn‑level RL in the research‑agent paper.
tips_zh: 建议先阅读第一篇关于可验证奖励强化学习（RLVR）的论文，因为它提出了近未来策略优化（NPO），在多模态推理上取得了显著提升，掌握其中的混合策略框架有助于理解后续图像编辑中的协调强化学习以及研究智能体的层级强化学习。
